query:
ALTER TABLE tasks 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS startDate varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phaseId varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS milestoneId int DEFAULT NULL;
